markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new hires Mariana and Jess to GrowthX Labs, providing company context and role expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs is rapidly growing, moving from a scrappy startup phase to a more structured organization with defined roles and processes](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [The company uses a pod-based structure for client management, with pod leads overseeing strategy and account managers handling day-to-day client interactions](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Notion and Slack are primary tools for documentation and communication, with AirOps and Airtable used for content workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [New hires should focus on familiarizing themselves with company documentation, tools, and assigned client accounts in their first week](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3706.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview and Growth

  - [GrowthX Labs has grown from $2M to $3M in annual recurring revenue last month](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Currently at 25 clients, aiming for 100 clients by end of 2025 ($12-20M revenue)](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [Transitioning from overlapping roles to more defined structure and processes](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=2408.0)
  - [Leveraging AI for efficient service delivery, aiming for "software margins" in services](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)

### Company Values and Principles

  - [Core values: Do best work, be energized, push boundaries of what's possible](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Key principles: Communicate with clarity, relentless excellence, never stop learning, own the outcome](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [Emphasis on AI-native approach and continuous learning to stay ahead of competition](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)

### Team Structure and Roles

  - [Moving to a pod-based structure for client management](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Pod lead: Owns strategy, delegates tasks, manages resources](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=2932.0)
  - [Account manager: Handles day-to-day client interactions, contributes to strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=2862.0)
  - [Writers and other specialists dedicated to specific pods](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)

### Tools and Processes

  - [Notion: Primary documentation and knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Slack: Main communication tool, with channels for each client and internal discussions](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=2115.0)
  - [AirOps: Workflow tool for content research and generation](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3918.0)
  - [Airtable: Client content operating system for organizing assignments](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3921.0)

### Onboarding Process

  - [New hires to review personal training section in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3706.0)
  - [Familiarize with assigned client accounts, watch past meeting recordings](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3780.0)
  - [Explore AirOps and Airtable workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3918.0)
  - [Holiday break coming up (weeks of Dec 23 and Dec 30)](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3643.0)

### Client Management

  - [Weekly calls with most clients, transitioning to less frequent for some](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3588.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve agenda and data presentation in client meetings](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3480.0)
  - [Need for better process in reviewing and updating client briefs with feedback](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3334.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mariana and Jess to review personal training sections in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3706.0)
  - [Explore assigned client accounts and familiarize with their Notion pages and Slack channels](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3707.0)
  - [Watch past client meeting recordings, especially kickoff calls](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3780.0)
  - [Begin joining client calls this week to observe and say hello](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3630.0)
  - [Full transition to new pod structure planned for the week after the holiday break](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3665.0)
  - [Kyle to follow up with more details on account transitions](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=3641.0)
  - [All-hands meeting scheduled for tomorrow to cover recent changes](https://fathom.video/share/ZyzqpGfyuaZeV2B1xzaWNx9rGGUiiLy9?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
